title: Add Narada proper PowerShell agent-start surface
goal: Provide a repo-root PowerShell surface matching the working narada-andrey.ps1 agent-start invocation style.
context:
The operator wants to avoid .cmd wrappers and use the same ergonomic shape as `.
arada-andrey.ps1 agent-start -Agent narada-andrey.Robin -Runtime codex -Exec`. Narada proper has a local tools/agent-start/start-agent.mjs carrier from task 1261 but no repo-root PowerShell wrapper.
required_work:
Add `narada.ps1` at the Narada proper repo root with an `agent-start` command that delegates to tools/agent-start/start-agent.mjs. Update Start-NaradaArchitect.ps1 and docs to use `.
arada.ps1 agent-start -Agent narada.architect -Runtime codex -Exec`. Verify dry-run/no-launch and command shape. Preserve no source Site import and no operator-surface runtime copying.
criteria: Repo root `narada.ps1` exists and supports `agent-start -Agent <id> -Runtime codex -Exec`.
`narada.ps1 agent-start -Agent narada.architect -Runtime codex -DryRun -Json` returns the local agent-start dry-run result.
Start-NaradaArchitect.ps1 delegates through narada.ps1 rather than node directly.
Documentation names the PowerShell invocation as the preferred command surface.
No narada-andrey runtime state, operator-surface runtime copying, or source Site import is introduced.
